testsuite.name: io.github.eucsoh.integration.EndToEndSyntheticTest

testcase.name: synthetic data respects pack configuration inference()
CUSUM detects regime change in synthetic data()
detect MOSFET degradation in synthetic data()
detect battery degradation in synthetic data()
stable synthetic data produces no alarms()
linear trend detection on gradual degradation()

testsuite.system-out: [calibrateEa] Temperature span too narrow (1.3599999999999994°C < 5°C), using default ✓ Inferred pack: 24S, 88.80000000000001V nominal [calibrateEa] Temperature span too narrow (0.9100000000000037°C < 5°C), using default ✓ CUSUM detected 5 regime changes - Alarm at 1000 km (knee at 6240 km) - Alarm at 1000 km (knee at 6240 km) - Alarm at 1300 km (knee at 6240 km) - Alarm at 6800 km (knee at 6240 km) - Alarm at 800 km (knee at 6240 km) [calibrateEa] Calibrated Ea=10.0kJ/mol (T range: 40.39–61.53°C, n=104) ✓ Detected 22 MOSFET/thermal alarms [ERROR] Missing required columns in /tmp/euc_soh_test18067908294621703945/summary_test/test_summary_summary.csv [calibrateEa] Temperature span too narrow (1.2099999999999937°C < 5°C), using default [ERROR] Missing required columns in /tmp/euc_soh_test18067908294621703945/summary_test/test_summary_summary.csv ✓ Summary: 156 logs, 150-23400 km Req band: 0,2817-0,2831 Ω Pack: 32S, R_pack=0,448 Ω ✓ Detected 26 battery alarms [calibrateEa] Temperature span too narrow (1.4699999999999989°C < 5°C), using default ✓ Stable data: 5 alarms / 52 logs (9,6%) [calibrateEa] Temperature span too narrow (4.399999999999999°C < 5°C), using default ✓ Detected 3 linear trends - Upward trend on R_batt_median_25C: +-0,0001Ω/1000km (p=0,000) - Upward trend on R_mosfet_hot: +0,0001Ω/1000km (p=0,000) - Upward trend on temp_board_max: +0,0526Ω/1000km (p=0,000)
